title: Possible regression in a21a84b
body:
My project () build automatically the toolchain in Travis CI, and then it synthesize the bitstream. I haven't changed anything in the HDL, but this week the build has failed. Last week it was OK.

Some info:

SUCCESS build #108 - LOG: https://travis-ci.org/adumont/hrm-cpu/builds/531446647

Toolchain commits used in build 108:
/home/travis/toolchain/arachne-pnr.ver:840bdfdeb38809f9f6af4d89dd7b22959b176fdd
/home/travis/toolchain/icestorm.ver:dd8c003e796d570fc93d35e18dc0cce820c46021
/home/travis/toolchain/symbiyosys.ver:f087a71f499f77970e43805fa48df7465aeeed6c
/home/travis/toolchain/yices2.ver:6dc67e9d1c11e22c40ea5ac110ead56acb9e2195
/home/travis/toolchain/yosys.ver:5772732a6d24bbf1a46301f03623567079316f7a

FAILED build #109 - LOG: https://travis-ci.org/adumont/hrm-cpu/builds/534482459

Toolchain commits used in build 109:
/home/travis/toolchain/arachne-pnr.ver:840bdfdeb38809f9f6af4d89dd7b22959b176fdd <-- same
/home/travis/toolchain/icestorm.ver:d78e9185f86293442b361990a7a2b3f5bf30c173   <-- changed
/home/travis/toolchain/symbiyosys.ver:f087a71f499f77970e43805fa48df7465aeeed6c <-- same
/home/travis/toolchain/yices2.ver:4328f5b43e0d73bf58008d78b8e2f771d27f6358  <-- changed (not related)
/home/travis/toolchain/yosys.ver:c907899422884d959632ed42c6589a0720b681e4  <-- changed

Error (best seen in the build log, see link above)
arachne-pnr -d 1k -p top-alhambra.pcf builddir/alhambra/top.blif -o builddir/alhambra/top.pnr
[...]
fatal error: failed to route

I've done a git bisect run,  rebuilding Yosys and my project and it gave me this log:

```
git bisect start
# good: [5772732a6d24bbf1a46301f03623567079316f7a] Merge pull request #1004 from YosysHQ/clifford/fix1002
git bisect good 5772732a6d24bbf1a46301f03623567079316f7a
# bad: [c907899422884d959632ed42c6589a0720b681e4] Merge pull request #1017 from Kmanfi/bigger_verilog_files
git bisect bad c907899422884d959632ed42c6589a0720b681e4
# good: [64b604207deefb87faa1aaf158012b7063526c6f] Merge pull request #1010 from hzeller/yacc-self-contained
git bisect good 64b604207deefb87faa1aaf158012b7063526c6f
# bad: [c9def5407cd59e8542201217c890bbe4c89fff5c] Merge pull request #1012 from YosysHQ/clifford/sigspecrw
git bisect bad c9def5407cd59e8542201217c890bbe4c89fff5c
# good: [f67ec1b2350c3bd88edacba7ad799bf60b33da61] Do not leak file descriptors in cover.cc
git bisect good f67ec1b2350c3bd88edacba7ad799bf60b33da61
# bad: [a21a84b3b45d252ff050d3ae7e738d157b0b2be8] Improvements in opt_clean
git bisect bad a21a84b3b45d252ff050d3ae7e738d157b0b2be8
# good: [287de4b848bdd33a9ba52018fc9b9779a10e60c7] Add rewrite_sigspecs2, Improve remove() wires
git bisect good 287de4b848bdd33a9ba52018fc9b9779a10e60c7
# first bad commit: [a21a84b3b45d252ff050d3ae7e738d157b0b2be8] Improvements in opt_clean

```
Bisect points to a21a84b3b45d252ff050d3ae7e738d157b0b2be8.

Hope that helps.
